scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run --cwd cloud/workers typecheck
scripts.typecheck:packages: tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --lib ES2022,DOM --strict --noImplicitAny --noUncheckedIndexedAccess --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --allowImportingTsExtensions --types bun packages/core/src/index.ts packages/cli/src/index.ts packages/mcp/src/index.ts packages/server/src/index.ts packages/browser/src/index.ts
